summary: Iteration 11 - AI Budget Analysis Integration Testing Complete. All 4 requested features passed. Auto-load AI Budget Analysis on Time Tracking tab, AI chatbot budget analysis via command bar, budget tracking cards display, and refresh AI analysis button all working correctly.
passed_tests: Auto-load AI Budget Analysis on ProjectDetail Time Tracking tab: Navigated to /projects, clicked FX1 - AI Auditing Module, clicked Time Tracking tab - AI Budget Analysis section auto-loaded with narrative, alerts, recommendations

AI chatbot budget analysis: Opened command bar (Ctrl+K), typed 'Analyze the budget for FX1 project', pressed Enter - confirm dialog showed Budget Analysis intent with project name FX1 - AI Auditing Module, clicked Analyze button, results showed inline with narrative ('FX1 is currently tracking well at 2% budget utilization with 6h of the 300h budget consumed'), burn rate (Weekly 1.5h, Projected 300h, On Track), alerts, and recommendations
Budget tracking data display: On FX1 ProjectDetail Time Tracking tab, verified summary cards show Total Budget (300h), Total Actual (6h), Budget Variance (-294h), Budget Used (2%)
Refresh AI analysis: On Time Tracking tab, clicked Refresh button next to AI Budget Analysis title - new analysis loaded successfully
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing FX1 project with 300h budget and 6h actual hours logged
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Budget Analysis feature is complete and working. Key endpoints: GET /api/ai/project-budget-analysis/{project_id} returns JSON with narrative, burn_rate, alerts, recommendations, phase_insights. Frontend uses getProjectBudgetAnalysis query in ProjectDetail.js Time Tracking tab. Command bar handles BUDGET_ANALYSIS intent via ConfirmCommandDialog.js. Emergent LLM key is configured in backend/.env as EMERGENT_LLM_KEY and used by emergentintegrations.llm.chat.LlmChat.

data_displayed: Burn rate (weekly, projected, weeks remaining, on_track)

ai_chatbot_budget_analysis.trigger: Ctrl+K opens CommandBar, type budget query, AI parses BUDGET_ANALYSIS intent
flow: Open command bar with Ctrl+K or floating AI button
Confirm dialog shows project name and Analyze button
Click Analyze to get inline results

refresh_ai_analysis.behavior: Triggers refetchAnalysis() to reload AI analysis

ai_integration_details.fallback: Rule-based analysis via _generate_fallback_analysis() if AI fails
